name: Chocolate Lava Cakes
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces Bittersweet or Semisweet, Chocolate; finely chopped
8 ounces Bittersweet or Semisweet, Chocolate; finely chopped
Ice cream =OR= custard sauce -- for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the chocolate filling: Line a plastic ice cube tray with plastic wrap and poke holes in each cube. Melt chocolate with cream and corn syrup; whisk until smooth. Add vanilla, cool to tepid.
2. Freeze filled ice cubes for at least 4 hours or up to a month.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Butter eight 4-ounce souffle dishes or ramekins.
4. Melt chocolate with coffee; let cool for 15 minutes, stir in vanilla.
5. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until glossy.
6. Mix a quarter of the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture, gently fold in the rest.
7. Fill each dish about halfway with batter, place a frozen chocolate cube in the center, and top with remaining batter.
8. Bake for 18-20 minutes until puffy and set. Loosen edges and invert onto plates.
9. Sift cocoa powder over the cakes before serving.
